signals.headline: Market-Wide Price Surge on Geopolitical Hopes | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Market-Wide Price Surge on Geopolitical Hopes | NO | MED confidence**  
Bitcoin topped $75K, Ethereum +8.6%, XRP +4.2%, Solana +6.3% amid U.S.-Iran ceasefire signals, but no binding resolutions or policy shifts confirmed to directly impact prediction markets.[4][5]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

signals.headline: SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No confirmations, announcements, or resolutions reported as of now; prices for XRP ($1.34-$1.39), Solana ($80-$86), and Ethereum ($2,377) are steady or surging ahead of the U.S. SEC-led discussion on crypto regulation, with whale accumulation and ETF inflows boosting sentiment.[1][4][7]
matched_markets: Will the price of Solana be above $100 on April 18?
Will the price of XRP be above $1.60 on April 19?

signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record (April 14) | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record (April 14) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Network activity surged to 148M daily non-vote transactions, driven by Alpenglow upgrade anticipation (targeting 150ms finality), but no new confirmation or release occurred today.[3][6]
